waymo_like_early_growth.label: Waymo-like · Early growth
waymo_like_early_growth.description: Current-generation cost structure across Waymo's 11 serving markets, using an evidence-triangulated active-fleet-equivalent density.

waymo_like_mature_dense.label: Waymo-like · Mature dense city
waymo_like_mature_dense.description: Higher local density, better utilisation and improved vehicle and operating productivity.

waymo_like_replicated_multicity.label: Waymo-like · Replicated multi-city
waymo_like_replicated_multicity.description: A 25-city network with lower vehicle cost, high utilisation and increasingly repeatable city launches.

cybercab_early_growth.label: Cybercab · Early growth
cybercab_early_growth.description: Evidence-weighted Cybercab architecture with lower vehicle cost but limited density and high central uncertainty.

cybercab_mature_dense.label: Cybercab · Mature dense city
cybercab_mature_dense.description: A denser Cybercab network with improved utilisation, lower manufacturing cost and better local productivity.

cybercab_replicated_multicity.label: Cybercab · Replicated multi-city
cybercab_replicated_multicity.description: Claims-realised vehicle economics combined with mature utilisation and broad platform absorption.
